creator: dmaddox@sc.rr.com
text:
Thanks.  I have no specific reason to think he's ignoring me...
Maybe he died, maybe he switched to BeOS, maybe he's been
abducted by aliens ;-)  But one thing's for sure...  He's not
fixing the port.

On Mon, Dec 25, 2000 at 05:19:11PM -0500, Will Andrews wrote:
> On Mon, Dec 25, 2000 at 01:20:03PM -0800, Donald J . Maddox wrote:
> >  This is an easy one for anybody with a commit bit.  These ports
> >  have been broken on -current for months.  I submitted these changes
> >  first to the maintainer and got no response in 2 months, then to
> >  gnats, and it doesn't seem to exactly grab anybody's attention here
> >  either.  I don't mean to seem impatient but these ports have been
> >  broken for months on -current, and it would take almost no time at
> >  all to apply this patch...  Thanks in advance :)
> >  
> >  (I say 'these ports' because this brokenness affects _all_ of the
> >  timidity++ slave ports as well as the timidity++ port.)
> 
> I would fix it, except I don't use timidity++, but if you're right and
> the guy maintaining it is ignoring you, I'll take action.
> 
> -- 
> wca
